tasks.build: deno task prepare:bundler && cd app && deno run -A npm:vite@8.0.10 build --configLoader native && deno run -A npm:vite@8.0.10 build --configLoader native --ssr src/entry.ssr.tsx --outDir dist/server
tasks.dev: deno task prepare:bundler && cd app && deno run -A npm:vite@8.0.10 --configLoader native --mode ssr --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173
